summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Resource Planning MVP. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: 11/13 tests passed. Core features working: JWT auth with RBAC, capacity heatmap timeline grid with correct color coding (green/yellow/red), CRUD operations, auto-seeding with over-allocation, and RBAC enforcement.

resolved_bugs.issue: Projects and Allocations creation failing with 'cannot encode object: datetime.date' error
resolved_bugs.root_cause: MongoDB's pymongo driver cannot encode Python date objects. Pydantic models use date type but MongoDB needs datetime objects
resolved_bugs.fix_applied: Added date-to-datetime conversion in create_project and create_allocation endpoints. Updated seeding code to use datetime objects. Updated capacity report to handle datetime-to-date conversion

resolved_bugs.issue: Frontend not loading - 'Incorrect locale information provided' error from React Query DevTools
resolved_bugs.root_cause: date-fns v4 has breaking changes with locale handling. React Query DevTools was trying to detect locale and failing
resolved_bugs.fix_applied: Disabled React Query DevTools by commenting out import and component usage in App.js

ui_bugs.issue: Allocations nav link not clickable - blocked by user info div at bottom of sidebar
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot navigate to Allocations page by clicking sidebar link (can still access via URL)
ui_bugs.workaround: Navigate directly to /allocations URL or use force=True in click

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (11/13 tests passed - 2 failures due to UI overlay issue, not functionality)

items.description: The user info div at the bottom of the sidebar (with email and logout button) is overlapping the Allocations nav link, making it unclickable. The div has 'absolute bottom-0' positioning which causes the overlap.
items.suggested_fix: In /app/frontend/src/components/Layout.js, adjust the sidebar layout to prevent overlap. Either: (1) Add padding-bottom to the nav container to account for the user info div height, or (2) Change user info div positioning, or (3) Make sidebar scrollable with proper spacing

items.description: DevTools were disabled to fix locale error. Consider re-enabling with proper locale configuration or upgrading to compatible version
items.suggested_fix: Either downgrade date-fns to v3.x or configure proper locale for date-fns v4 and React Query DevTools
